evaluating-text-rendering.description: Guidelines for evaluating text additions and modifications in images.

evaluating-style-transfers.description: Guidelines for evaluating artistic style transfers.

evaluating-object-replacements.description: Guidelines for evaluating object replacements and modifications.

evaluating-background-changes.description: Guidelines for evaluating background replacements and scene changes.

evaluating-multi-step-edits.description: Guidelines for evaluating prompts with multiple distinct instructions.

compare_images.description: Compare a source image and edited images to identify differences, check if instructions were followed, and assess visual quality.
